Found linting issues:
line 24: unusedVariables: variable '$managed_var' is defined but not used within scope:
	something: '{{ $managed_var := "value1" }}'
line 34: unusedVariables: variable '$hub_var' is defined but not used within scope:
	something: '{{hub $hub_var := "value1" hub}}'
line 61: unusedVariables: variable '$managedVar' is defined but not used within scope:
	managed-var: '{{ $managedVar := "managed-value" }}something'
line 62: unusedVariables: variable '$hubVar' is defined but not used within scope:
	hub-var: '{{hub $hubVar := "hub-value" hub}}something'

template: tmpl:18: undefined variable "$managed_var"
